title: 2019 Consumer Confidence Report
description: Review the 2019 Consumer Confidence Report on water quality for the U.S. Naval Academy.
text:
In accordance with federal and state drinking water regulations, Naval Support Activity (NSA) Annapolis/U.S. Naval Academy (USNA) has prepared the 2019 Annual Drinking WaterQuality Consumer Confidence Report (CCR). The CCR contains information regarding the quality of the water produced and explains where your water comes from and how it is treated.
The 2019 Drinking Waterquality CCR is available at the following websites:
https://www.usna.edu/PublicWor ks/_files/documents/2019_USNA_ CCR_Posted.pdf
https://ndw.cnic.navy.mil/Operations-and-Management/Water-Quality-Information/
In addition, Anne Arundel County provides the drinking water for the North-Severn area.
For more information or to obtain copies, please contact the Drinking Water media manager at 410-293-1028.
Category: General Interest, Research, Press Releases, People
